notes: starting_stats: per-character stat block computed as shared CharacterStatsData base + per-character Modifiers list. Stats not in the shared base (Damage, CriticalChance, XPGain, etc.) are appended with base_value=0.

character_specific_improvements is empty for all heroes - the store-item 'characterimprovements' are global hero-agnostic upgrades that apply to whichever wizard is selected. They are listed under global_character_improvements.
starting_artifact: not present in CharacterResource schema; field kept as null.

Localization entries (title/description/skin names) are referenced by Key only; the StringTables in ExportedProject are stubs and the actual localized strings are not present in the YAML and were not extracted.
skin labels: 0/1/2/3 mapped to Base/Alt 1/Alt 2/Alt 3 by convention.
prefab_guid_verified=true means the skin's GameplayPrefab guid matches an existing GameplayPlayer_*.prefab.meta in Assets/GameObject/.

challenges_referencing_this_hero: each non-starter hero has a corresponding Unlock<Hero> challenge in Resources/challenges/wizard/. Reginald is the starter (initialCost=0) and has no unlock challenge.
